summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Savyn new features batch (8 features): Terms acceptance, Digital contracts, Smart attribution, Wallet CSV export, Admin features (suspension/KYC/payout), Fraud detection, Analytics, Lemon Way mock. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed for key components.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_* users during backend tests for suspension, KYC, contracts testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 new features tested and working. Registration requires accept_terms=true, Tontine join requires accept_contract=true and shows digital contract dialog. Admin features (suspend, KYC, payout, fraud alerts, analytics) all working. Wallet CSV export working. Lemon Way mock returns sandbox status.
passed_tests: ✅ Admin can suspend user via POST /api/admin/suspend/{user_id}
✅ Admin can approve KYC via PUT /api/admin/kyc/{user_id}
✅ Fraud alerts requires admin auth (401 without token)
✅ Wallet export requires authentication (401 without token)
✅ Lemon Way status endpoint returns sandbox mode (GET /api/lemonway/status)
✅ Trigger payout endpoint validates tontine status
✅ Register page shows terms checkbox with data-testid='register-terms-checkbox'
✅ Terms checkbox is unchecked by default
✅ Submit button is disabled when terms unchecked
✅ Admin page loads successfully with data-testid='admin-page'
✅ Fraud tab shows 'Detection de Fraude' content with alerts
✅ Analytics tab shows tontine/kyc distribution charts
✅ Contract dialog opens when clicking join button (for verified KYC user)
✅ Contract dialog shows 'Contrat Digital de Participation' title
✅ Confirm button disabled when checkbox unchecked
✅ Confirm button enabled after checking checkbox
✅ Wallet page loads with export button (data-testid='wallet-export-btn')
mocked_api_note: KYC verification is auto-approved (simulated). SEPA payments are simulated via Stripe test mode. Lemon Way integration is in sandbox_simulated mode.
rca_of_issue: None - all features working as expected
